Septic Tank
Pumping

Residential and commercial septic pumping done right, done fast, and done direct — serving Johnson County and all of North Texas.

📞 Call Now
What We Do

Professional Septic
Pumping Services

Your septic tank needs regular pumping to prevent backups, odors, and costly system failures. Direct Pumping provides thorough, professional pumping for residential and commercial properties throughout North Texas — with honest assessments and no surprise charges.

  • 🏠
    Residential Pumping — Single-family homes, rural properties, and acreage. We locate, expose, and fully pump your tank with minimal disruption to your yard.
  • 🏢
    Commercial Pumping — Businesses, multi-unit properties, and commercial facilities. Scheduled service contracts available to keep your system compliant and operational.
  • ⚡
    Emergency Pumping — Backed-up or overflowing? We offer emergency response across our North Texas service area. Call us any time.
  • 📋
    System Assessment — Every pumping includes a visual inspection of tank condition, inlet/outlet baffles, and overall system health. We tell you what we find — no fluff.
How Often?

Recommended
Pumping Schedule

1–2 person household Every 4–5 years
3–5 person household Every 3–4 years
5+ person household Every 2–3 years
Commercial / High-use Annually or as needed

Not Sure When You Last Had It Pumped?

If you can't remember, it's probably time. Call us and we'll assess the situation and give you an honest answer.

Our Process

What to Expect
On Service Day

📞

Schedule & Confirm

Call or submit a request online. We confirm your appointment quickly and give you a clear arrival window — no all-day waiting.

🚛

We Arrive On Time

Our truck arrives on schedule. We locate your tank, expose the lid if needed, and get to work — efficiently and professionally.

🪣

Full Pump & Inspect

We fully pump the tank and visually inspect the system. If we see anything concerning, we'll tell you plainly and explain your options.

✅

Clean Site, Clear Report

We clean up, restore the area, and walk you through what we found. You leave knowing exactly what condition your system is in.

💧

Proper Waste Disposal

All waste is transported and disposed of at licensed facilities in full compliance with Texas environmental regulations.

📅

Maintenance Reminders

We keep your service record on file and can set up reminders so your system never goes too long between pumpings.

Ready to Schedule Your Septic Pumping?

Serving Johnson County and all of North Texas. Same-day appointments often available.
